name: display-mcp
label: Display
description: Display images, files, audio, video, and URLs in chat

skills.description: Display MCP routing judgment: which display tool for which content, media routing rules, when display_ui is worth it, artifact iteration

Authoring contracts for interactive artifacts, mini-app dashboards, and Dock panels: display_ui backchannel and theme events, pin_app action buttons, live data panels, feeds, scoped dashboards, file pins. Use whenever building or updating a display_ui artifact, mini-app, or dashboard.
